name: mofa-memory
author: hagency
description: Persistent vector memory — store and retrieve knowledge across agent runs using SQLite and OpenAI embeddings

tools.name: store_memory
tools.description: Embed content with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small and persist it to a local SQLite database with tags and an optional source URL. Returns the assigned memory ID. Use after research, crawling, or any task where results should survive across sessions.

content.description: Text content to embed and store (e.g. a research report, key fact, or document excerpt)

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering this memory (e.g. ['research', 'ai', 'gpt5'])

source.description: Optional source URL or file path for this content

tools.name: retrieve_memory
tools.description: Semantic search over stored memories using cosine similarity on OpenAI embeddings. Returns the top-k most relevant memories above a score threshold, sorted by relevance. Use before starting research to surface prior work on the same topic.

query.description: Natural language query to search for semantically similar stored memories

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 5

tools.name: clear_memory
tools.description: Delete stored memories. If tags are provided, only memories with at least one matching tag are deleted. If no tags are provided, ALL memories are cleared.

tags.description: Optional tag filter. Omit to delete all memories.

tools.name: list_memories
tools.description: List stored memories with id, tags, source, creation time, and an 80-character content preview. Optionally filter by tags.

tags.description: Optional tag filter. Only memories with at least one matching tag are returned.
